The classification of Cardamomum walang places it within the genus Cardamomum, which is a group of plants commonly known as cardamoms. Cardamomum walang is closely related to other species within the same genus, such as Cardamomum glaucescens. Further research is needed to confirm the exact classification of Cardamomum walang within the family Zingiberaceae.
